TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_bazing, title = bazing, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/bazing} }

S.FORM: bazing ngta ga pinbazing na ngta. mangiq bazing ga skblak na hi. bazing na mqu ga baqun mangiq uzi?
bazing ngta ga pinbazing na ngta. mangiq bazing ga skblak na hi. bazing na mqu ga baqun mangiq uzi?
S.PHON: βaziŋ ŋta ɣa pinβaziŋ na ŋta. maŋiq βaziŋ ɣa s~ɕkβlak na ħi. βaziŋ na mqu ɣa βaqun maŋiq uzi?
